channel.title: News on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in News on Bali Kini

item.title: PORJAR Bali 2026: Thousands of Student Athletes Compete in 39 Sports
item.description:
Bali’s Pekan Olahraga Pelajar (PORJAR) — the Student Sports Week — officially begins on June 5–10, 2026 across Denpasar and multiple venues throughout the Island of the Gods. This prestigious biennial multi-sport event once again serves as a grand stage for thousands of Bali’s finest young athletes to compete for glory at the provincial level.

What Is PORJAR Bali?

PORJAR is a provincial-level multi-sport competition exclusively for elementary, middle, and high school students across Bali. The event aims to identify promising young athletic talent while fostering sportsmanship and inter-regional unity.

item.title: Bali News Recap: High Waves, Clear Skies & Sacred Calendar — June 3, 2026
item.description:
Wednesday, June 3, 2026. Here is today’s summary of the key news, alerts, and information from around Bali — from natural conditions and safety warnings to the sacred calendar you need to know this month.

⚠️ High Wave Warning: June 1–4

BMKG (Indonesia’s Meteorology, Climatology and Geophysics Agency) has issued a warning for high waves of 2.5–4 metres in the Badung Strait and South Bali waters. Coastal flooding risk applies to areas along Jembrana, Tabanan, Badung, Denpasar, Gianyar, and Klungkung.
